Operation 'code_analyze' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, not_actionable. Original summary is too long and reads more like a description. The summary should be concise and action-oriented. The description duplicates the summary verbatim, making it unclear what the actual operation does versus usage guidance. Improved summary is 8 words and action-focused. Improved description clarifies the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, and relationship to other operations for better AI agent routing.

data.current_summary: Instant repo overview — languages, complexity, file count, tech stack, code quality findings, and credential scanning. Use as your first call to understand any remote public codebase. Supports language filtering and path scoping (for large monorepos, analyze a subdirectory instead of the full repo). When analysing multiple repositories, call in parallel rather than sequentially. Dependency/build directories excluded by default.
data.current_description: Instant repo overview — languages, complexity, file count, tech stack, code quality findings, and credential scanning. Use as your first call to understand any remote public codebase. Supports language filtering and path scoping (for large monorepos, analyze a subdirectory instead of the full repo). When analysing multiple repositories, call in parallel rather than sequentially. Dependency/build directories excluded by default.
data.summary_suggestion: Analyze repository structure, languages, complexity, and code quality
data.description_suggestion: Performs comprehensive analysis of a remote public git repository, returning an overview of detected languages, code complexity metrics, file count, technology stack, code quality findings, and credential scanning results. Supports language filtering and path scoping for targeted analysis of subdirectories in large monorepos. Dependency and build directories are excluded by default. This is the recommended first call when analyzing any new codebase. Returns structured findings that can be used with code_get_findings for detailed drill-down.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too long and reads more like a description. The summary should be concise and action-oriented. The description duplicates the summary verbatim, making it unclear what the actual operation does versus usage guidance. Improved summary is 8 words and action-focused. Improved description clarifies the operation's purpose, inputs, outputs, and relationship to other operations for better AI agent routing.

message: Operation 'code_file_tree' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, not_actionable. Original summary is too long and mixes usage guidance with feature description. The summary and description are identical, reducing clarity. Improved summary is 7 words and action-oriented. Improved description separates what the operation does from how to use it, clarifies output fields, and explains the operation's role in the analysis workflow.

data.current_summary: List files and directories in any public git repo. Supports fuzzy file search (query parameter), language/path filtering, and depth control. Use to explore project layout, find files by name, or browse specific directories. Results capped at 1000 files; response includes total_files, files_shown, and truncated fields. Use language or path_filter to narrow large repos. Dependency/build directories excluded by default.
data.current_description: List files and directories in any public git repo. Supports fuzzy file search (query parameter), language/path filtering, and depth control. Use to explore project layout, find files by name, or browse specific directories. Results capped at 1000 files; response includes total_files, files_shown, and truncated fields. Use language or path_filter to narrow large repos. Dependency/build directories excluded by default.
data.summary_suggestion: Browse repository file structure with fuzzy search and filtering
data.description_suggestion: Lists files and directories in a remote public git repository with support for fuzzy file search, language filtering, path scoping, and depth control. Results are capped at 1000 files; the response includes total_files, files_shown, and truncated fields to indicate if results were limited. Use to explore project layout, locate files by name, or browse specific directories. Dependency and build directories are excluded by default. Useful for understanding repository structure before targeted code retrieval.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too long and mixes usage guidance with feature description. The summary and description are identical, reducing clarity. Improved summary is 7 words and action-oriented. Improved description separates what the operation does from how to use it, clarifies output fields, and explains the operation's role in the analysis workflow.
